src_raw: The Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HK$264 billion in 2017. This comprised gains of HK$80.4 billion on overseas equities, gains of HK$58.3 billion on Hong Kong equities, gains of HK$34.4 billion on bonds, a positive currency translation effect of HK$53.5 billion on non-Hong Kong dollar assets and gains of HK$37.4 billion on other investments held by the investment holding subsidiaries of the Exchange Fund. src_raw: The Public Enquiry Service provides an effective means for the public to better understand the key functions and operations of the HKMA. A total of 8,752 enquiries were handled in 2017, about half of which were related to banking policies and regulations, monetary and economic issues, consumer banking issues as well as notes and coins. Notable examples included the Coin Collection Programme, banking products and services, bankingrelated guidelines and circulars, monetary and economic statistics, prudential measures for property mortgage loans, and prevention of money laundering and terrorist financing.
mt_raw: 公眾查詢服務為大眾提供一個有效途徑，以加深了解金管局的職能及運作。2017年，共處理了8,752宗查詢，當中約一半與銀行業政策及規例、貨幣及經濟事項、銀行消費者事宜，以及紙幣及硬幣有關。值得注意的個案包括硬幣收集計畫、銀行產品及服務、銀行業相關指引及通告、貨幣及經濟統計資料、不動產按揭貸款的審慎監管措施，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集等。

src_raw: The HKMA corporate website (www.hkma.gov.hk), with over 60,000 pages in English and traditional and simplified Chinese, is the public access gateway to up-to-date information about the HKMA. It also contains the register of authorized institutions (AIs) and local representative offices and the register of securities staff of AIs, both maintained under section 20 of the Banking Ordinance, as well as the register of stored value facility (SVF) licensees under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance. Dedicated webpages and eye-catching short-cut links are designed to draw public attention to the new initiatives of the HKMA, such as account opening, the regulatory regime for SVFs, the Infrastructure Financing Facilitation Office and the Fintech Facilitation Office, as well as important and timely information, such as reminders on the need to remain vigilant against bogus telephone calls and the location of Coin Carts under the Coin Collection Programme.
mt_raw: 金管局企業網站（www.hkma.gov.hk）以英文及繁簡體中文提供超過60,000頁的內容，是大眾獲取金管局最新資訊的管道。網站亦載有《銀行業條例》第20條規定的認可機構及本地代表辦事處紀錄冊，以及認可機構證券業務員工紀錄冊；還有《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》規定的儲值支付工具持牌人紀錄冊。網站設有專頁及醒目的快捷連結，以吸引大眾注意金管局的新措施，例如開立帳戶、儲值支付工具監管制度、基建融資促進辦公室及金融科技促進辦公室等，以及重要及及時的資訊，例如提醒大眾提高警惕，提防詐騙電話，以及硬幣收集計畫下的收銀車地點等。

src_raw: The HKMA Information Centre on the 55th floor of Two International Finance Centre is an important resource for introducing the work of the HKMA to the community and promoting public awareness of monetary and banking matters. It consists of an exhibition area and a library, and is open to the public six days a week. The exhibition area introduces the work of the HKMA and the development of money and banking in Hong Kong. It also contains reading materials and exhibits for the study of Hong Kong’s monetary, banking and financial affairs.
mt_raw: 位於國際金融中心二期55樓的金管局資訊中心，是向社會介紹金管局工作及推廣貨幣及銀行知識的重要資源。中心設有展覽廳及圖書館，每週六天開放予公眾。展覽廳介紹金管局的工作及香港貨幣及銀行業的發展，並設有閱讀材料及展品，供市民研究香港貨幣、銀行及金融事務。

src_raw: To reach out to the community and raise public awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA organised four public education seminars for about 2,000 secondary school students and teachers in 2017. src_raw: The HKMA recruits, develops and maintains a highly professional workforce to support its policy objectives and respond flexibly to changing work priorities. While the HKMA is an integral part of the Government, it employs staff on terms different from those of the civil service to attract personnel with the right experience and expertise. As a public organisation, the HKMA aims to maintain a lean and flexible structure and, where possible, to redeploy staff resources to undertake new initiatives and meet increasing workload.
mt_raw: 金管局招聘、培育及保留一支高度專業的團隊，以支持其政策目標，並靈活應對不斷變化的工作優先順序。雖然金管局是政府的一部分，但它以與公務員制度不同的條款聘用員工，以吸引具備相關經驗及專業知識的人才。作為一間公共機構，金管局致力維持精簡及靈活的架構，並在可能的情況下調配人力資源，以推行新措施及應付日益增加的工作量。

src_raw:
- Enhancing banking and financial stability, which includes:
    – enhancing capacity to support the launch of the Faster Payment System and easy banking initiatives;
    – strengthening supervisory capacity to deal with the regional and business expansion of banks and to facilitate (i) the wider adoption of fintech in the provision of banking services and (ii) collaboration with other regulatory authorities on cyber security and fintech issues; and
    – supporting the work of the Fraud and Money Laundering Intelligence Taskforce to fight against fraud, money laundering and other types of financial crimes, and strengthening legal support for enforcement actions under legislation governing anti-money laundering and SVFs.
- Strengthening investment, risk management and other related support for the further expansion and diversification of the Exchange Fund’s investment activities.
- Stepping up global macro and financial-sector surveillance, and strengthening talent development programmes to ensure that the HKMA has the necessary human capital to meet the long-term development needs of the organisation.
mt_raw:
- 提升銀行及金融穩定性，包括：
    – 提升能力以支持推出快速支付系統及銀行易措施；
    – 強化監管能力，以應對銀行的區域及業務擴張，並促進(i)更廣泛地採用金融科技提供銀行服務，以及(ii)與其它監管機構就網路安全及金融科技議題協作；及
    – 支持反詐騙及洗錢情報工作組的工作，以打擊詐騙、洗錢及其他類型的金融犯罪，並強化法律支援，以執行打擊洗錢及儲值支付工具的法例下的執法行動。
- 強化投資、風險管理及其他相關支援，以進一步擴展及多元化外匯基金的投資活動。
- 強化全球宏觀及金融體系監察，並加強人才發展計畫，以確保金管局擁有必要的人力資本，應付該局的長遠發展需要。

src_raw: Temporary resources are deployed to meet other work demands. The HKMA also transfers staff members on secondment to other international or local organisations, such as the International Monetary Fund (IMF) and the Financial Services Development Council, to assist in activities or policy initiatives in which Hong Kong or the HKMA has an interest. Some staff members are deployed on a full-time or part-time basis to provide operational support to the Hong Kong Deposit Protection Board and the Treasury Markets Association.
mt_raw: 為應付其他工作需求，金管局亦會調配臨時資源。金管局亦會把員工借調到其他國際或本地組織，例如國際貨幣基金組織及金融發展局，以協助進行香港或金管局有興趣的活動或政策工作。部分員工以全職或兼職形式，為香港存款保障委員會及財資市場公會提供運作支援。

src_raw: The Financial Secretary (FS) determines the pay and conditions of service for HKMA staff on the advice of the Governance Sub-Committee (GSC) through the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee (EFAC), taking into account the prevailing market rates and practices. Remuneration comprises a total cash package and a provident fund scheme, with minimal benefits in kind. The cash package consists of monthly fixed pay (or basic pay) and variable pay, which may be awarded to individual staff members as a lump sum once a year, depending on performance.
mt_raw: 財政司司長根據管治委員會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會提出的建議，並考慮市場薪酬水平及慣例，釐定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條款。薪酬包括總現金酬金及公積金計畫，並附有少量實物福利。現金酬金包括每月固定薪金（或基本薪金）及浮動薪金，浮動薪金可按表現於每年年底以一筆過形式發放予個別員工。

Special pay adjustments may be made from time to time for individual meritorious staff members to maintain their pay competitiveness.
mt_raw: 財政司司長每年根據管治委員會透過外匯基金諮詢委員會提出的建議，檢討金管局員工的薪酬，並考慮管治委員會對金管局上年度表現的評估、由獨立人力資源顧問進行的金融界薪酬調查結果，以及其他相關因素。為保持薪酬競爭力，金管局可不時為表現優異的個別員工作出特別薪酬調整。

src_raw: Any approved annual adjustments to the fixed pay and any variable pay awards for the HKMA are distributed to individual staff members based on their performance. Investment professionals in the HKMA are subject to a variable pay system that seeks to strengthen the link between their investment performance and remuneration award. The pay adjustments and awards for individual staff members at the ranks of Executive Director and above are approved by the FS on the advice of the GSC. The staff members concerned are not present at the meetings when their pay is discussed. The pay adjustments and awards for individual staff members at the ranks of Division Head and below are determined by the Chief Executive of the HKMA under delegated authority from the FS and within the approved overall pay awards.
mt_raw: 金管局任何經批准的固定薪金年度調整及浮動薪金獎勵，會按個別員工的表現發放。金管局的投資專業人員適用浮動薪金制度，以加強其投資表現與薪酬獎勵之間的關聯。助理總裁或以上職級個別員工的薪酬調整及獎勵，由財政司司長根據管治委員會的建議批准。有關員工不會出席討論其薪酬的會議。主管或以下職級個別員工的薪酬調整及獎勵，由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授予的權力，以及在經批准的整體薪酬獎勵範圍內決定。

src_raw: To develop a pool of young talent with sharp analytical minds, strong communication skills and good team spirit for a long-term career in central banking, the HKMA runs two trainee programmes: the MT programme and the GE programme. Each programme lasts for a period of two years.
mt_raw: 為培育一批具備敏銳分析能力、強勁溝通技巧及良好團隊精神的年輕人才，以長期投身中央銀行工作，金管局開辦了兩個見習計畫：見習經理計畫及見習經濟師計畫。每個計畫為期兩年。

src_raw: The MT programme prepares young graduates interested in central banking work to become the HKMA’s future key management staff and contribute to the financial stability and prosperity of Hong Kong. Each MT undergoes on-the-job training in two to three departments to acquire hands-on experience on the important functions of the HKMA. For the GE programme, young graduates interested in economic research are offered the opportunity to harness their research skills in two to three departments to provide important input to the policy formulation process.
mt_raw: 見習經理計畫為有志從事中央銀行工作的年輕畢業生作好準備，成為金管局未來的核心管理人員，為香港的金融穩定和繁榮作出貢獻。每位見習經理會在兩至三個部門接受在職培訓，以獲得金管局重要職能的實務經驗。見習經濟師計畫則為有志從事經濟研究的年輕畢業生提供機會，在兩至三個部門運用其研究技巧，為政策制定過程提供重要意見。

src_raw: Both the MT and GE programmes provide an all-rounded career development environment for the trainees. Apart from on-the-job training, the MTs and GEs also attend structured foundation central banking courses organised internally and by leading international or regional organisations. Upon successful completion of the respective programme, MTs are offered appointments as Managers and GEs as Economists to continue their pursuit of a professional career in the organisation.
mt_raw: 見習經理及見習經濟師計畫為學員提供全面的職業發展環境。除了在職培訓外，見習經理及見習經濟師亦會參加由內部及主要國際或區域組織舉辦的結構性基礎中央銀行課程。成功完成有關計畫後，見習經理會被委任為經理，見習經濟師則為經濟師，繼續在金管局追求專業事業。

src_raw: My objectives are to obtain reasonable assurance about whether the financial statements as a whole are free from material misstatement, whether due to fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report that includes my opinion.  Reasonable assurance is a high level of assurance, but is not a guarantee that an audit conducted in accordance with the Audit Commission auditing standards will always detect a material misstatement when it exists.  Misstatements can arise from fraud or error and are considered material if, individually or in the aggregate, they could reasonably be expected to influence the economic decisions of users taken on the basis of these financial statements.
mt_raw: 我的目標是取得合理保證，以確定財務報表整體是否不存在因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯報，並發表包含我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但並不能保證按照審計署審計準則進行的審核在存在重大錯報時總能發現該錯報。錯報可能因欺詐或錯誤而產生，如果錯報個別或合計起來可能影響用戶依據這些財務報表作出的經濟決策，則認為錯報具有重要性。

mt_raw:
在按照審計署審計準則進行審核時，我在整個審核過程中運用專業判斷並保持職業懷疑態度。我還：
- 識別和評估財務報表是否存在因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯報風險，設計和執行適應這些風險的審計程序，以及獲取充分、適當的審計憑證，作為我發表意見的依據。未能發現因欺詐而導致的重大錯報的風險高於未能發現因錯誤而導致的重大錯報的風險，因為欺詐可能涉及串通、偽造、故意遺漏、虛假陳述或凌駕於內部控制之上；
- 瞭解與審核相關的內部控制，以設計適應當時情況的審計程序，但目的並非對該集團的內部控制有效性發表意見；
- 評估金融管理局所採用的會計政策是否適當，其會計估計及相關披露是否合理；
- 就金融管理局採用持續經營的會計基礎是否適當作出結論，並根據所獲取的審計憑證，確定是否存在與可能對該集團作為持續經營的能力產生重大疑慮的事件或情況有關的重大不確定性。如果我得出結論認為存在重大不確定性，我有責任在審計師報告中提請注意財務報表中的相關披露，或如果披露不充分，則修改我的意見。我的結論是基於截至我發表審計師報告之日所獲取的審計憑證。然而，未來的事件或情況可能導致該集團無法繼續作為持續經營；
- 評估財務報表的整體呈現、結構和內容，包括披露，以及財務報表是否以實現公允呈現的方式反映了基礎交易和事件；以及
- 獲取關於該集團內實體或業務活動的財務資訊的充分、適當審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見負有全部責任。

src_raw: The Monetary Authority, under delegated authority from the Financial Secretary as Controller of the Exchange Fund (the Fund), manages the Fund in accordance with the provisions of the Exchange Fund Ordinance (Cap. 66).  The principal activities of the Fund are safeguarding the exchange value of the currency of Hong Kong and maintaining the stability and integrity of Hong Kong’s monetary and financial systems.
mt_raw: 金融管理局根據財政司司長作為外匯基金（該基金）管理人的授權，按照《外匯基金條例》（第66章）的規定管理該基金。該基金的主要業務是捍衛港元匯率，並維持香港貨幣及金融體系的穩定和健全。

src_raw: The assets of the Fund are managed as four portfolios: the Backing Portfolio, the Investment Portfolio, the Long-Term Growth Portfolio and the Strategic Portfolio.  The assets of the Backing Portfolio fully match the Monetary Base, under Hong Kong’s Currency Board system.  The Investment Portfolio is invested primarily in the bond and equity markets of the member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development.  The Long-Term Growth Portfolio holds private equity and real estate investments.  The Strategic Portfolio holds shares in Hong Kong Exchanges and Clearing Limited acquired by the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region (HKSAR) for the account of the Fund for strategic purposes. Operating segment information is set out in note 30.
mt_raw: 該基金的資產分為四個組合管理：支持組合、投資組合、長期增長組合及策略性資產組合。根據香港貨幣發行局制度，支持組合的資產與貨幣基礎完全匹配。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債券及股票市場。長期增長組合持有私募股權及房地產投資。策略性資產組合持有香港交易及結算所有限公司的股份，該股份由香港特別行政區政府為該基金的策略性目的而收購。經營分部資料載於附註30。

src_raw: These financial statements have been prepared in accordance with all applicable Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards (HKFRSs), which is a collective term that includes all applicable individual Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards, Hong Kong Accounting Standards (HKASs) and Interpretations issued by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA), and accounting principles generally accepted in Hong Kong.  A summary of the significant accounting policies adopted by the Fund and its subsidiaries (together referred to as the Group) is set out below.
mt_raw: 這些財務報表已按照所有適用的香港財務報告準則編製，該準則是一個統稱，包括所有適用的個別香港財務報告準則、香港會計準則及香港會計師公會頒布的詮釋，以及香港普遍接受的會計原則。該基金及其附屬公司（統稱「該集團」）所採納的重要會計政策概要載列如下。

src_raw: The preparation of financial statements in conformity with HKFRSs requires management to make judgements, estimates and assumptions that affect the application of policies and the reported amounts of assets, liabilities, income and expenditure.  The estimates and associated assumptions are based on experience and various other factors that are believed to be reasonable under the circumstances, the results of which form the basis for making judgements about carrying values of assets and liabilities that are not readily apparent from other sources.  Actual results may differ from these estimates.
mt_raw: 按照香港財務報告準則編製財務報表，要求管理層作出判斷、估計及假設，這些判斷、估計及假設影響政策的適用及所報告的資產、負債、收入及支出的金額。估計及相關假設是基於經驗及其他因素，這些因素在當時情況下被認為是合理的，其結果構成對資產及負債的賬面值作出判斷的依據，而這些賬面值通常不易從其他來源獲得。實際結果可能與這些估計不同。

src_raw: The estimates and underlying assumptions are reviewed on an ongoing basis.  Revisions to accounting estimates are recognised in the period in which the estimate is revised if the revision affects only that period, or in the period of the revision and future periods if the revision affects both current and future periods.
mt_raw: 估計及基本假設是持續檢討的。會計估計的修訂於修訂估計的期間確認，如果修訂只影響該期間，或於修訂期間及未來期間確認，如果修訂同時影響當前期間及未來期間。
